description: Safari downloads parser reads Downloads.plist and emits BrowserEvent per download
steps: Use plist crate to read the file: plist::Value::from_file(path)
Root dict has key 'DownloadHistory' containing an array of dicts
Each dict has: DownloadEntryURL (string), DownloadEntryPath (string), DownloadEntryDateAddedKey (real/f64 = Core Data secs), DownloadEntryProgressTotalToLoad (integer)
Test factory creates a binary plist with plist::to_file_binary(f.path(), &value)
Test: parse_empty_safari_downloads — empty DownloadHistory array yields empty vec
Test: parse_single_safari_download — browser=Safari, artifact=Downloads, attrs[url] correct
